features.description: Detailed list of running Tenders

features.description: Tenders search by Object, Reference, Client, Location, Domains, ...

features.name: Advanced filters
features.description: Tenders filtering by advanced fields: guarantee, electronic bidding, Lots count, Samples, Visits, Meetings, Licences, Agrements, ...

features.name: Advanced sort
features.description: Tenders ordering by deadline, publication, estimate, guarantee, ...

features.name: Categories breakdwon
features.description: Tenders breakdown by category

features.description: Tenders breakdown by Client, Execution location or Domains of activity

features.name: Tender details
features.description: Regular details about individual Tenders

features.name: Advanced details
features.description: Advanced data about individual Tenders like Samples requirements, Scheduled visits and meetings, Required licences and qualifications, official portal link, views, downloads, ...

features.name: Changes history
features.description: Changes made to Tenders since publication

features.name: Favorite tenders
features.description: Maximum number of Favorite tenders at a time

features.description: Maximum number of Tenders Documents downloads per month. (Same tender can be downloaded many times.)

features.name: DCE history
features.description: Tenders files dowload past bidding deadline

features.name: DCE requests

features.description: View Tenders winners and awarded amounts

features.description: View financial contest details: Calculated offers Average and Reference price, submitted offers amounts with comparison to Average and Reference values, ...

features.name: Financial analysis

features.name: Advanced aggregations

features.name: Maximum number of companies
features.description: How many companies can be managed

features.name: Manage companies expirables
features.description: Keep track of companies expirable assets (like electronic signing pens, rentals, services, administrative and regular requirements, … )

features.description: Keep track of your Bonds (draft, filed, claimed, returned, overdue, lost, … )

features.name: Allotted Tenders

features.name: Simulator
features.description: Simulate financial offers competition for a given Tender or Lot
